blended.narrative: Welch Village is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 748 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 1.9" of snow, highs of 25°F, winds around 22 mph.
